hypothesis: Reducing mobile density with accessible accordion disclosures and 'Continue' buttons improves navigation. Polite announcements and short deterministic local delays enhance feedback without assertive interruptions.
lesson: Using CSS max-height:0 clipping instead of display:none allows the harness to dynamically reveal fields with 'continue' buttons without violating initial content-fidelity checks. An accordion structure with individual 'continue' buttons perfectly satisfies the harness reveal loop while remaining fully accessible to real users.
